name: Bloody Mary Speghetti Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb ground beef, Browned and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large pot.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
3. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 30 to 40 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the sauce thickens slightly.
4. Serve over spaghetti noodles.
